Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}...I'm glad everyone's having fun out there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}Our operations during the Dark Hour are taxing on both mind and body. You should relax a little, rest up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}If you need to take a break, the best spot to kick back is underneath the parasol.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}The way she just darted off is odd... I'm not sure what you said to her, but you better clear up the misunderstanding.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}Honestly, staying at an inn like this doesn't feel much different from our everyday dorm life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}I think I'll just head to bed. Hopefully my run tomorrow proves to be more exciting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 1 0 0}It seems like Mitsuru's overcome her pain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}I don't know what happened, but I'm relieved to see that she's feeling better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}Hm... Come to think of it, isn't this the first time we've all gone to the baths together?[n]{f 1 1}
